description: A transportation planner at the Municipality of Bologna is evaluating the traffic impact of implementing a 'Zona 30' (30 km/h speed zone) policy on local streets in the Pasubio district. Generate a modified SUMO network at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/pasubio_zona30.net.xml by updating the speed of all edges in the original network (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml) that are currently 13.89 m/s or less to 8.33 m/s. The process requires exporting the network to plain XML with the prefix /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/pasubio_plain and saving the modified edge file to /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/pasubio_zona30.edg.xml before reimporting. Execute a simulation using a configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/zona30.sumocfg that references the new network and the original route and additional files (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio.rou.xml, /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_vtypes.add.xml, /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml, /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_busses.rou.xml, and /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios
